Episodes.Title: Deadly Reputation
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Richard Jones
Episodes.Plot: TAM Airlines Flight 3054, an Airbus A320 touches down on the known deadly runway 35L of Congonhas-São Paulo Airport in Brazil. Flight 3054 is unable to stop, and slides into a warehouse and gas station, killing 199 people.

Episodes.Title: The Plane That Flew Too High
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Carlos Diaz, Edsson Morales
Episodes.Plot: When a packed passenger jet, known for its safety, suddenly plummets to Earth from over 30,000 feet, a small Venezuelan investigative team searches for answers.

Episodes.Title: Split Decision
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Beer
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Kevin Jubinville, Stephen Park
Episodes.Plot: Arrow Flight 1285, carrying 256 people including U.S. service personnel, stalled and crashed minutes after take-off from Gander, Newfoundland on December 12th, 1985.

Episodes.Title: Breakup Over Texas
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Marc Devigne, Jamie Spilchuk
Episodes.Plot: Investigate the 1991 crash of commuter plane Continental Express Flight 2574, and see how good intentions went terribly wrong.

Episodes.Title: Munich Air Disaster
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Gary Lang
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Paul Essiembre, Alex Poch-Goldin
Episodes.Plot: Revisit the 1958 plane crash that destroyed Manchester United's soccer team and left a pilot's reputation in tatters.

Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Peter Maxwell, Chris Gillett

Episodes.Title: Bad Attitude
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Beer
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Denis Akiyama, Dale Yim
Episodes.Plot: On 22 December 1999, Korean Air Cargo flight 8509 departs Stansted Airport, London bound for Milan, but less than a minute after it takes off, the plane crashes and kills all four crew members on board. Air accident investigators ...

Episodes.Title: Blind Spot
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, David Snelgrove, Brendan Wall
Episodes.Plot: A Boeing 727, on approach to Lindbergh Field, collides with a Cessna 172 over a residential area in San Diego causing both planes to crash and scattering body parts across a neighborhood.

Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Wayne Best
Episodes.Plot: Aviation investigators try to determine what caused a mid-air fire on Nigeria Airways flight 2120, chartered by Canadian airline Nationair, that on 11 July 1991 ultimately caused the death of all 247 passengers and 14 crew on boar...

Episodes.Title: I'm the Problem
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Matthew Olver, Jonathan Purdon
Episodes.Plot: See how one man's rage led to two minutes of terror for 42 passengers and crew aboard PSA Flight 1771.

Episodes.Title: Nowhere to Land
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Armen Kazazian
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Victor Gomez, Diego Fuentes
Episodes.Plot: On 24 May 1988, the pilots of TACA Airlines flight 110 achieve one of the most remarkable deadstick landings in commercial aviation history. Investigators have to determine why the engines of a brand new Boeing 737-300 failed in m...

Episodes.Title: The Invisible Plane
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Beer
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Ian Matthews
Episodes.Plot: Shocking discoveries come to light after two planes collide on the runway at one of Europe's busiest airports.

Episodes.Title: Impossible Landing
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Armen Kazazian
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stewart Arnott, Jonah Bay
Episodes.Plot: Meet the survivors of 1989's United Airlines Flight 232 and learn the remarkable story of their emergency crash landing.
